response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack and geospatial experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ or Rust development in routing, navigation, or geospatial data pipelines — key requirements for the role. Their C++ exposure is limited to academic/legacy NI LabWindows work, and their GIS projects use DLang and Node.js, not the required systems-level languages or routing tile optimization workflows.
strengths: Strong open-source geospatial project experience with GISCollective
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and systems
Demonstrated expertise in data pipelines and low-latency systems
concerns: No commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing or navigation domains
Geospatial work uses DLang/Node.js, not the required C++/Rust stack
Lacks evidence of distributed systems or routing tile optimization at scale
